value.0: Iacomo is a senior clerk of the Vetzer Bank, known for his meticulous approach to ledgers and tallies. Calm and methodical, he oversees deposits and records with careful attention, ensuring that every transaction passing through Southport's counting halls is properly documented.

The Watcher keeps an eye on those who enter the facility, ensuring that all who come do so with intent to use the offered services as intended. One cannot elude the Watcher. It indicates the presence of all, to ensure the safety of patrons and their goods.

Value.value: *The construct's eyes gleam as it examines you.*

value.0: Knights of Helm. They all stand for the same principle: Seek out evil where it breeds, and snuff it out.
A sight of steel and years of training...Their shots often ring true.
A clerk of the Vezter Bank in Southport.
A clerk of the Vezter Bank in Southport.
A clerk of the Vezter Bank in Southport.
A clerk of the Vezter Bank in Southport.
Knights of Helm. They all stand for the same principle: Seek out evil where it breeds, and snuff it out.

Gianni serves alongside Iacomo as a senior clerk of the Vetzer Bank, handling the daily flow of merchants and their coin. Quick with figures and efficient in his work, he keeps the counters moving smoothly while maintaining the precise records expected of the bank.
A clerk of the Vezter Bank in Southport.
